name: Incidents
description: Declarative agent created with Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit can assist user in calling APIs and retrieving responses

conversation_starters.text: Open a browser window on the user's machine for interactive intranet sign-in.
Click a previously resolved element by its elementId.
Fill #username with alice@example.com on the current page.
Return a JSON representation of the DOM for a page.
Navigate to a URL. Omit pageId to open a new tab; provide it to reuse an existing tab.
Take a PNG screenshot of a page for diagnostic purposes.
Resolve a CSS selector to a stable element handle reference.
Submit form #loginForm on the current page.
